name: copilot-cli-extensions
description: Five Copilot CLI extensions for multi-model orchestration: triple-duck (parallel critique + consensus), triple-review (iterative code review), triple-plan (parallel planning + judge merge), debate (adversarial 2-model + judge), duck-council (6 role-specialized rubber-ducks + judge synthesis). Each extension returns a markdown instruction packet the calling agent executes via the built-in `task` tool.
